title: Claim node
description: A material statement that must be supported by evidence or marked unresolved. Carried in a claim.added event under payload.node. origin records honest human/machine attribution (D11/A1.4). Materialization is deterministic REPLAY of recorded history; claim extraction is NOT deterministic regeneration. TOLERANT v0 draft: additionalProperties is permissive; the locked enums below stay.

id.description: Node ID embedding the artifact ID, e.g. claim:association-board-brief-001:c014.

origin.description: Who produced the claim: human_authored, agent_extracted, or hybrid (agent-proposed then human-edited).

extraction.description: Optional attribution metadata for agent_extracted/hybrid claims. Records what proposed the claim; does not imply deterministic regeneration.
